title: Arrays - Working with Lists
description: Learn how to create and manipulate arrays to store collections of values.

blocks.title: Array Basics

blocks.content:
Arrays have built-in methods (functions) to manipulate them:

| Method | Does what | Example |
|--------|-----------|----------|
| `.push()` | Add to end | `arr.push(4)` |
| `.pop()` | Remove from end | `arr.pop()` |
| `.shift()` | Remove from start | `arr.shift()` |
| `.unshift()` | Add to start | `arr.unshift(0)` |
| `.length` | Get size | `arr.length` |
| `.includes()` | Check if item exists | `arr.includes(3)` |
| `.indexOf()` | Find position | `arr.indexOf(3)` |
| `.join()` | Combine to string | `arr.join(", ")` |

**Example:**

```javascript
let items = [1, 2, 3];
items.push(4);        // [1, 2, 3, 4]
items.pop();          // [1, 2, 3]
items.unshift(0);     // [0, 1, 2, 3]
```
